descriptionText: M/Y Pelorus For Sale 2003 | Guest Cabins:12 | Crew Cabins:46M/Y Pelorus For Sale 2003 represents an opportunity to acquire one of the most recognised and carefully maintained 115‑metre Lürssen yachts ever built. Delivered in 2003 and continually upgraded throughout her life, including a major refit scheduled for completion in 2025, she remains in good condition and demonstrates the long‑term value of thoughtful ownership, engineering quality and consistent investment. Designed externally by Tim Heywood with interiors by Terence Disdale, Pelorus blends practical large‑yacht capability with a calm, well‑considered atmosphere across her decks.Specifications • Brand: Lürssen • Year: 2003 / 2025 • Length: 115 m • Max beam: 18.3 m • Construction: Steel • Draught: 4.66 m • Gross tonnage: 5,403 GT • Fuel capacity: 395,000 l • Fresh water capacity: 100,200 l • Engines: 2 × 5,300 hp Wärtsilä • Guest cabins: 12 • Crew cabins: 46Her exterior layout has been organised to provide a range of open‑air spaces suitable for long‑distance cruising or extended stays on board. The sun deck includes a pool with counter‑current system, a Jacuzzi and generous seating areas suited to both daytime relaxation and evening dining. Several terraces and balconies are positioned across the yacht, including two that open from the dining salons and another that transforms a lower‑deck suite into a private waterside area. The yacht also features two helipads—one forward and one on the owner’s deck—allowing guests and crew to manage international arrivals with ease.Inside, Pelorus offers a comfortable, private environment designed for long periods at sea. A sky lounge with bar, multiple seating areas and a convertible dancefloor sits at the heart of the guest spaces. Forward, a dedicated cinema provides a quiet retreat with tiered seating and modern audiovisual equipment. An internal lift connects each deck, making movement throughout the yacht straightforward for guests of all ages.The lower deck includes a well‑equipped gym with sea‑level access, together with a spa area comprising a hydrotherapy pool, steam room and rooms for treatments or relaxation. These facilities allow guests to maintain wellbeing on board during extended passages.The owner’s deck contains a private suite positioned to take in broad forward views, complemented by a study, lounge and direct access to both aft and forward terraces. Across the yacht, twelve guest cabins accommodate up to twenty‑four guests, and the crew quarters are arranged for a team of forty‑six, ensuring a high level of service and operational capability at all times.Powered by two 5,300‑hp Wärtsilä engines, Pelorus reaches a maximum speed of around 20 knots and carries the fuel capacity required for long‑range cruising. Zero‑speed stabilisers support comfort at anchor, and the tender garage houses custom Vikal tenders suitable for both guest transport and watersports activities.M/Y Pelorus For Sale 2003 is a large, capable yacht built to a high standard, and her ongoing upgrades ensure she remains ready for a new owner who values space, range and reliable construction.
descriptionHtml:
M/Y Pelorus For Sale 2003 | Guest Cabins:12 | Crew Cabins:46

M/Y Pelorus For Sale 2003 represents an opportunity to acquire one of the most recognised and carefully maintained 115‑metre Lürssen yachts ever built. Delivered in 2003 and continually upgraded throughout her life, including a major refit scheduled for completion in 2025, she remains in good condition and demonstrates the long‑term value of thoughtful ownership, engineering quality and consistent investment. Designed externally by Tim Heywood with interiors by Terence Disdale, Pelorus blends practical large‑yacht capability with a calm, well‑considered atmosphere across her decks.

Specifications
• Brand: Lürssen
• Year: 2003 / 2025
• Length: 115 m
• Max beam: 18.3 m
• Construction: Steel
• Draught: 4.66 m
• Gross tonnage: 5,403 GT
• Fuel capacity: 395,000 l
• Fresh water capacity: 100,200 l
• Engines: 2 × 5,300 hp Wärtsilä
• Guest cabins: 12
• Crew cabins: 46

Her exterior layout has been organised to provide a range of open‑air spaces suitable for long‑distance cruising or extended stays on board. The sun deck includes a pool with counter‑current system, a Jacuzzi and generous seating areas suited to both daytime relaxation and evening dining. Several terraces and balconies are positioned across the yacht, including two that open from the dining salons and another that transforms a lower‑deck suite into a private waterside area. The yacht also features two helipads—one forward and one on the owner’s deck—allowing guests and crew to manage international arrivals with ease.

Inside, Pelorus offers a comfortable, private environment designed for long periods at sea. A sky lounge with bar, multiple seating areas and a convertible dancefloor sits at the heart of the guest spaces. Forward, a dedicated cinema provides a quiet retreat with tiered seating and modern audiovisual equipment. An internal lift connects each deck, making movement throughout the yacht straightforward for guests of all ages.

The lower deck includes a well‑equipped gym with sea‑level access, together with a spa area comprising a hydrotherapy pool, steam room and rooms for treatments or relaxation. These facilities allow guests to maintain wellbeing on board during extended passages.

The owner’s deck contains a private suite positioned to take in broad forward views, complemented by a study, lounge and direct access to both aft and forward terraces. Across the yacht, twelve guest cabins accommodate up to twenty‑four guests, and the crew quarters are arranged for a team of forty‑six, ensuring a high level of service and operational capability at all times.

Powered by two 5,300‑hp Wärtsilä engines, Pelorus reaches a maximum speed of around 20 knots and carries the fuel capacity required for long‑range cruising. Zero‑speed stabilisers support comfort at anchor, and the tender garage houses custom Vikal tenders suitable for both guest transport and watersports activities.

M/Y Pelorus For Sale 2003 is a large, capable yacht built to a high standard, and her ongoing upgrades ensure she remains ready for a new owner who values space, range and reliable construction.
